title: cassine australis
intro: Cassine australis, also known as the Australian cassine or cassine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Anacardiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of cassine australis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide antimicrobial protection, making it a valuable herb in the treatment of various health conditions. Cassine australis can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
